<think>The user is asking which company has the highest "资本公积" (capital reserve). I need to extract the capital reserve values from all three documents to compare them.

Let me first open DOC1_A5 to get the exact verbatim text for the capital reserve value. Then I'll need to process DOC2 and DOC3 to compare values.

For now, I should open DOC1_A5 to extract the evidence.</think>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>Good, I opened DOC1_A5 and found the capital reserve (资本公积) value. From the <info> block, I can see:

|资本公积|3,100,051,705.03|3,041,751,253.03|

The current value (2024年3月31日) is 3,100,051,705.03 yuan.

This document is for 浙江盾安人工环境股份有限公司 (Zhejiang Dunan Artificial Environment Co., Ltd.) based on the anchor summary.

Now I need to process DOC2 and DOC3 to get their capital reserve values for comparison. Let me stop extracting from DOC1 and move to the next document.

For DOC1, I have the evidence: "|资本公积|3,100,051,705.03|3,041,751,253.03|"

I should stop extracting from DOC1 now since I have the key information, and the system will process the other documents in subsequent calls.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"已提取DOC1中资本公积的具体数值，需要继续处理DOC2和DOC3进行比较"}</search>
<answer>["|资本公积|3,100,051,705.03|3,041,751,253.03|"]</answer>
